preferred_skills: Service Mesh and API Gateway Configuration
responsibilities: Architect and build robust, scalable RESTful and GraphQL APIs that serve millions of requests per day with low latency
Design normalized relational database schemas and write optimized SQL queries to support high-throughput transactional workloads
Implement secure authentication and authorization flows using OAuth 2.0, JWT, and role-based access control
Integrate asynchronous message queues such as Kafka or RabbitMQ to decouple services and enable event-driven workflows
Develop and maintain microservices with well-defined contracts, versioned APIs, and backward-compatible schemas
Implement caching layers using Redis to reduce database load and achieve sub-millisecond response times for hot data paths
Instrument backend services with structured logging, metrics, and distributed tracing for production observability
Conduct performance testing and profiling to identify bottlenecks and optimize backend throughput and resource utilization
Collaborate with frontend and mobile teams to define API contracts and deliver developer-friendly SDKs and documentation
Automate deployment of backend services using CI/CD pipelines and containerized infrastructure on Kubernetes
